data.title: Dr. Trisha Bailey's inspirational success story as a self-made billionaire highlights Black excellence during Black History Month.
data.description: In Orlando, Florida, on August 1, 2025, during Black History Month, attention is drawn to influential figures who have left their mark on history and motivated future generations. Dr. Trisha Bailey's narrative emerges as a powerful representation of Black achievement, determination, and lasting impact. As a successful entrepreneur, Dr. Bailey has amassed a personal fortune exceeding one billion dollars, showcasing her remarkable journey and dedication to success.

T. ROWE POSTS 2Q AUM Increase of $110.5 Billion, Reaching $1.68 Trillion. Revenue for 2Q of $1.72 Billion Slightly Below Expectations of $1.75 Billion, While AUM Exceeds Expectations of $1.66 Trillion.

data.title: Oshkosh Corp. reports Q2 2025 net income of $204.8M, $3.16 per share, compared to $168.6M, $2.56 per share in Q2 2024.
data.description: Oshkosh Corporation, a prominent manufacturer of purpose-built vehicles and equipment, recently announced its financial results for the second quarter of 2025. The net income for the quarter totaled $204.8 million, translating to $3.16 per diluted share. This marks an increase from the second quarter of 2024, where the net income was $168.6 million, or $2.56 per diluted share. Additionally, the adjusted net income for Q2 2025 was $220.6 million, or $3.41 per diluted share, slightly higher than the $219.8 million, or $3.34 per diluted share, recorded in Q2 2024.

data.title: Middleby (NASDAQ: MIDD) buys Frigomeccanica, a global leader in food processing equipment, expanding its innovation.
data.description: A prominent global manufacturer in the commercial foodservice and residential kitchen industries, The Middleby Corporation (NASDAQ: MIDD), headquartered in Elgin, Illinois, has recently disclosed the purchase of Frigomeccanica S.p.A. This acquisition marks an expansion in Middleby's range of innovative equipment for the food processing sector. Frigomeccanica, renowned worldwide, specializes in solutions for drying, defrosting, fermentation, refrigeration, and preservation within the food processing field. The acquisition signifies Middleby's strategic move to bolster its offerings in this sector.

data.title: California DOI approves KCC US Wildfire Model V3.0 under PRID, allowing insurers to use model for ratemaking.
data.description: Boston-based company Karen Clark & Company (KCC) has received approval from the California Department of Insurance (CDI) for its US Wildfire Reference Model Version 3.0. This approval was granted under the Pre-Application Required Information Determination Procedure (PRID). Insurers can now utilize the catastrophe models for ratemaking purposes following this review. KCC is recognized as a pioneer in weather, climate, and catastrophe modeling. The California Department of Insurance's approval allows insurers to benefit from the advanced modeling capabilities provided by KCC.

data.title: Nexstar Media Group announces $1.86/share quarterly cash dividend for common stock shareholders.
data.description: In Irving, Texas, the Board of Directors of Nexstar Media Group announced a quarterly cash dividend of $1.86 per common stock share.

data.title: Piper Sandler buys G Squared Capital Partners, investment bank in D.C.; specializing in gov't services, defense tech.
data.description: In Minneapolis, Piper Sandler Companies (NYSE: PIPR), a prominent investment bank, revealed its acquisition of G Squared Capital Partners, a boutique investment bank focusing on government services and defense technology in Washington, D.C. The deal involves the takeover of G Squared, established in 2020 by Greg Nossaman and Greg Woodford, both experts with 20+ years in the respective sectors. The acquisition solidifies Piper Sandler's position in this niche market.

data.title: Surf Air Mobility (NYSE: SRFM) will present at Needham Virtual Conference on August 18. CEO, COO, and CFO will host meetings. Contact investors@surfair.com to schedule.
data.description: Los Angeles—Surf Air Mobility Inc. (NYSE: SRFM) revealed that CEO Deanna White and COO, along with CFO Oliver Reeves, will be present at the 14th Annual Needham Virtual Industrial Tech, Robotics, & Clean Tech 1x1 Conference on August 18. Interested parties can arrange meetings with Surf Air Mobility by contacting their Needham representative or emailing investors@surfair.com. Surf Air Mobility is a prominent regional air mobility platform.
Brookfield Renewable reports robust Q2 performance with impressive numbers.

data.title: Ray Dalio unloads Bridgewater stake after foreseeing debt collapse; advises 15% allocation to Bitcoin and gold for safety.
data.description: Renowned Bridgewater founder Ray Dalio, who has persistently expressed economic concerns in the past, has now lifted his suggested allocation levels for Bitcoin and gold to 15%, signaling a significant shift in his investment strategy.

data.title: Innovative Industrial Properties to report Q2 2025 results on NYSE on Aug 6, 2025. 5 executives to host investor conference call at 9:00 a.m.
data.description: A company by the name of Innovative Industrial Properties, Inc. (IIP) (NYSE: IIPR) revealed its plan to release its financial results for the second quarter of 2025 after the closure of trading on the New York Stock Exchange on August 6, 2025. The Executive Chairman, Alan Gold; President and CEO, Paul Smithers; CFO, David Smith; COO, Catherine Hastings; and CIO, Ben Regin, will be conducting an investor conference call at 9:00 a.m. on the same day.

data.title: Aitana concludes 'Metamorfosis Season' tour with three sold-out stadiums, 160,000+ attendees. 'Cuarto Azul' receives platinum certification. Global pop epicenter at Metropolitano featuring David Bisbal, Hombres G, Ela Taubert, Amaia, Amaral & more.
data.description: Pop sensation Aitana recently achieved a significant milestone as her album "Cuarto Azul" received a platinum certification for outstanding sales. The Metropolitano has transformed into a global pop hub with Aitana's grand tour, featuring notable guests like David Bisbal, Hombres G, Ela Taubert, Amaia, and Amaral. Each show in the tour commenced with Aitana's electrifying performance, captivating audiences.

data.title: Energy Efficient Motor Market to reach $72.06 billion by 2030, up from $48.52 billion in 2025, with 8.2% CAGR.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, by August 1, 2025, it is projected that the worldwide Energy Efficient Motor Market will increase to approximately USD 72.06 billion by 2030, up from the estimated USD 48.52 billion in 2025. This growth represents a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 8.2% from 2025 to 2030. The rise in focus on energy preservation globally is playing a significant role in driving this market expansion...

data.title: TELUS Corp declares $0.4163 CAD quarterly dividend per share on Common shares, payable Oct 1, 2025 to shareholders.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on July 31, 2025, it has been announced that the Board of Directors has approved a quarterly dividend of $0.4163 per share for the Common shares.
